title: spartium striatum proles procerum
intro: Spartium striatum proles procerum, commonly known as French broom, is a flowering shrub native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which make it useful in treating skin conditions and wounds. The health benefits of French broom include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of French broom can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne.
